title: memory_share: Ports with write enable wired straight to input wrongly skipped for SAT-based port sharing.

features.name: memory dual write ports with shared enable
features.description: Code should include a memory with two write ports driven by conditional logic using the same write enable signal

features.name: write enable signal from module input
features.description: Code should include a write enable signal that is directly connected to a module input port with no intermediate driver

features.name: memory read port sharing with write ports
features.description: Code should include a memory with concurrent read and write ports where write enable affects port eligibility for sharing
